🔥
Fire or Not

Discover what you both secretly want —
without revealing what you don't.

▶ Get it on Google Play

Free to download · Adults 18+ only

How it works

Simple. Private. Revealing.

Each partner swipes independently. Only the things you both want ever come to light.

🔗

Pair up

Connect with your partner using a private 6-digit code. No accounts or emails needed.

👆

Swipe solo

Each of you swipes through questions independently. YES, NO, or MAYBE — your NOs are yours alone.

🔥

Match!

When you both swipe YES, it's a Pure Match. One YES + one MAYBE becomes a Potential Match to discuss.

🎡

Spin the vault

All your matches live in The Vault. Spin the Roulette Wheel to let fate pick tonight's adventure.

Privacy first

Your NOs are never revealed.
Not now. Not ever.
